title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: spice-client-win bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for spice-client-win is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Spice client MSI installers for Windows clientsBug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Rebuild spice-client-win to pick some mingw CVE fixes (JIRA:RHEL-116619)

full_text:
An update for spice-client-win is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Spice client MSI installers for Windows clientsBug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Rebuild spice-client-win to pick some mingw CVE fixes (JIRA:RHEL-116619)
